summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rules-Based Recommendation Engine for Unchained Coffee. All backend APIs working perfectly (37/37 tests passed including new quiz, recommendations, and lot endpoints). Frontend features fully functional: 8-step taste quiz with proper validation and navigation, personalized recommendations with scoring/ranking/explanations, cold start editor's picks, hard budget filtering, and seamless navigation between pages. Admin dashboard operational with funnel analytics.
passed_tests: Backend: All 37 API tests passed (health, auth, profiles, responses, events, admin, taste-fit, quiz, recommendations, lots)
Quiz endpoints: POST /api/quiz/submit saves profile with all 8 fields correctly
Quiz endpoints: GET /api/quiz/profile returns saved profile data
Quiz validation: Invalid data properly rejected with 422 status
Recommendations: POST /api/recommendations returns personalized results when quiz exists
Recommendations: POST /api/recommendations returns editors_picks when no quiz exists (cold start)
Recommendations: Hard budget filtering works (under_15 budget excludes all over-$15 lots)
Recommendations: Lots sorted by score descending (98% → 85% → 84% → 58%)
Recommendations: 'Why recommended' explanations generated correctly
Lot endpoints: GET /api/lots returns all 6 published lots
Lot endpoints: GET /api/lots/{lot_id} returns specific lot details
Lot endpoints: GET /api/lots/nonexistent returns 404 correctly
TasteQuiz page: Loads at /demo/quiz with 8 steps (acidity, bitterness, body, roast, flavors, drink style, budget, brew)
TasteQuiz page: Scale selection (1-5) works for acidity and bitterness steps
TasteQuiz page: Option selection works for body, roast, drink style, budget steps
TasteQuiz page: Multi-select works for flavor tags and brew methods (up to 4 flavors)
TasteQuiz page: Step navigation (back/next) works correctly
TasteQuiz page: Progress bar updates properly (12.5% per step)
TasteQuiz page: Form validation prevents advancement without selections
TasteQuiz page: Quiz submission redirects to /demo/recommendations
Recommendations page: Shows personalized hero 'Your Personal Picks' after quiz completion
Recommendations page: Shows cold start hero 'Editor's Picks' when no quiz exists
Recommendations page: Score badges appear on cards (87%, 77%, 76%, 63%)
Recommendations page: Rank labels appear (TOP PICK, #2 MATCH, #3 MATCH)
Recommendations page: 'Why recommended' explanations display correctly
Recommendations page: Card navigation to PDP works (/demo/pdp/{handle})
Recommendations page: Refresh button works in personalized mode
Recommendations page: Quiz CTAs appear in cold start mode
Navigation: Header links work (Shop, Taste Quiz, For You, Admin)
Navigation: Quiz → Recommendations → Collection flow works seamlessly
Budget filtering: under_15 budget correctly excludes all lots over $15 (0/6 recommendations shown)
Admin dashboard: Login works with admin@unchainedcoffee.com / unchained2025
Admin dashboard: Products, funnel analytics, and navigation functional
Session persistence: Quiz data maintained across page navigation
Cold start vs personalized: System correctly switches between modes based on quiz completion
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (37/37 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all quiz, recommendations, and navigation features working perfectly)
